overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with green hair walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The journey transitions from a covered pedestrian walkway with red overhead lighting through open streets with massive digital billboards, down into a teal-lit underpass, and up to an elevated walkway. The environment features dense cyberpunk urban architecture with heavy neon signage and moderate pedestrian and vehicle activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with red neon ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction through the covered walkway

entered.detail: overhead metal canopy with red neon lighting running along the pedestrian walkway
white plastic chairs and tables arranged outside a building under umbrellas
glowing cyan and purple neon signs visible in the distance beyond the walkway exit
large vertical concrete columns supporting the overhead structure
modern building with reflective glass windows and vertical lines

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by red neon lights overhead. The path is flanked by concrete support pillars on the left and a glass building with outdoor cafe seating on the right. In the distance, bright neon signs hint at the bustling city beyond the sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with massive digital billboards

events.description: exits the covered walkway into an open intersection with bright digital billboards
vehicles pass by on the street to the left as the character approaches the crosswalk area

agents.ego_description: walking across the open intersection area toward the far sidewalk, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past on the street, headlights illuminating the road

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying a red kitsune mask advertisement
wide pedestrian crossing area with white striped markings
low orange and white striped barriers separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a vast open intersection dominated by towering digital billboards displaying vibrant advertisements. The scene shifts from the enclosed red-lit corridor to an exposed urban plaza with moving traffic on the left and crowds of pedestrians crossing the wide intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with towering neon advertisements

events.description: character continues walking straight as the camera pans slightly to capture the surrounding billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians while towering skyscrapers with digital ads rise on both sides

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead wearing a white shirt and dark pants

entered.detail: large vertical green digital screen displaying 'ALL BURNETT' text
dark tunnel entrance with stairs leading downward, marked by graffiti
black metal fence separating the sidewalk from the street traffic

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a bustling downtown sidewalk flanked by towering skyscrapers covered in massive digital advertisements. Traffic flows continuously on the left behind orange barriers and fencing, while the character approaches a dark underpass entrance ahead. The environment is densely packed with neon signage and urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass with teal neon lighting and graffiti walls

events.description: enters the underpass descending stairs into a darker, enclosed space with teal lighting
passes a brightly lit food vendor cart with intense white light contrasting the teal ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs into the underpass, passing a large man standing near the entrance

notable_agents.action: large shirtless man with red suspenders standing near the underpass entrance

entered.detail: enclosed concrete tunnel with graffiti-covered walls and overhead teal lighting
food stall with bright white lighting and a vendor serving customers
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
red and white striped barriers blocking off part of the underpass area

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a dimly lit underpass illuminated by teal neon lights and lined with graffiti-covered concrete walls. A food vendor operates a brightly lit cart on the left, casting stark white light against the greenish ambient glow. The space feels enclosed and subterranean compared to the open streets above.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending back to street level

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs leading up from the underpass
emerges from the underpass onto an elevated walkway with open city views

agents.ego_description: running up the concrete stairs to exit the underpass, emerging onto an elevated platform

entered.detail: steep concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
massive billboard displaying an advertisement visible from the top of the stairs
steam rising from vents on the elevated platform

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep concrete stairway leading up from the teal-lit underpass. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens onto an elevated walkway with a large digital billboard visible ahead and steam rising from vents. The transition from the enclosed underpass to the open elevated space reveals the city skyline beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with city overlook

events.description: vehicles visible moving on the street below the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pedestrian walkway passing vending machines and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the character on the narrow elevated path

entered.detail: raised concrete walkway with railings overlooking the street below
blue and white automated vending machine with illuminated display
vehicles moving on the multi-lane street visible through the walkway railing

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated pedestrian walkway that overlooks the busy city street below. Vending machines line the left side while pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction. The vantage point offers a view of the traffic and neon-lit buildings below, concluding the journey through this cyberpunk urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered, red-lit corridor into the overwhelming scale of a neon-drenched urban intersection. It begins within a covered pedestrian walkway, moving past concrete pillars and a glass-walled cafe under a canopy of red neon lights. As the character emerges from the shelter, the enclosed space opens into a vast plaza dominated by towering digital billboards and the chaotic flow of city traffic. The scene then shifts toward a bustling downtown sidewalk, where the camera glides past skyscrapers draped in massive advertisements and orange traffic barriers before finally approaching the dark mouth of an urban underpass.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a subterranean, teal-lit underpass up to an expansive elevated walkway overlooking a neon city. It begins in a dimly lit underpass where graffiti-covered concrete walls and a brightly lit food cart create a stark, enclosed atmosphere. As the character ascends a steep concrete stairway, the scene opens from the subterranean glow into a wider environment filled with rising steam and a distant digital billboard. The perspective then shifts to an elevated pedestrian walkway, moving past vending machines and oncoming pedestrians while revealing the busy traffic and towering neon architecture of the city below.
